sections_cited: Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 618 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.3292/2025 2. For order on office objections No.1 & 04 3. For orders on Misc. No.3293/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.3294/2025 5. For hearing of main case 14.02.2025 Mr. Rashid Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General 1. Granted. 2-5. Learned A.A.G. is present and waives notice. It is jointly submitted that this matter pertains to Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 and the controversy has been decided by a Division Bench of this Court in the case of Shell Petroleum Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & others reported as 2023 PTD 607, therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
